workflows.name: Lead to Opportunity Sales Process
workflows.description: Standard OOB business process flow guiding a lead through Qualify > Develop > Propose > Close, transitioning onto the opportunity after qualification.

workflows.name: Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing
workflows.description: Calculates con_leadscore from source/rating/firmographics via the Contoso Lead Score custom API and assigns owner by territory; posts hot-lead alerts to the sales channel.

workflows.name: Deal Desk Approval Routing
workflows.description: Sends the discount request through Approvals; on approval stamps con_approvedon and unblocks quote generation.

workflows.name: Auto-Create Deal Desk Review on Strategic Deal
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that creates a con_dealdeskreview record and blocks quote presentation until approved.

workflows.name: Require Est. Close Date & Value on Propose
workflows.description: Business rule making estimatedvalue and estimatedclosedate required and showing a strategic-deal warning at the Propose stage.

workflows.name: Invoice Paid Sync from F&O
workflows.description: Async workflow that updates invoice status to Paid when a fully settled F&O payment is surfaced via dual-write.

workflows.name: Phase to First Response and Resolution
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding agents through Identify, Research, and Resolve stages with required fields and SLA checkpoints.

workflows.name: Auto-Route New Cases to Tier Queue
workflows.description: Real-time classic workflow that assigns a case to the correct queue based on con_channelsource, product subject, and entitlement tier.

workflows.name: Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation
workflows.description: Cloud flow that posts an adaptive card to the manager's Teams channel and emails the account owner when a Gold/Platinum case is escalated.

workflows.name: Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback
workflows.description: Cloud flow that ingests Customer Voice responses, calls Azure sentiment scoring, and upserts a con_servicefeedback row linked to the originating case.

workflows.name: Require Resolution Notes Before Close
workflows.description: Business rule enforcing that resolution description and root-cause subject are populated before a case can be set to Resolved.

workflows.name: Nightly Knowledge Article Review Reminder
workflows.description: Async process that flags published articles past con_reviewduedate and assigns a review task to the article owner.

workflows.name: Work Order Lifecycle
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding a work order through Identify, Estimate, Schedule, Perform, and Close-Out stages.

workflows.name: Auto-Create Safety Inspection for Hazardous Work Orders
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that spawns a con_safetyinspection record and blocks booking until it exists when the hazardous site flag is set.

workflows.name: SLA Breach Risk Escalation
workflows.description: Cloud flow that notifies the dispatch team channel, creates a penalty credit per con_slapenaltyrule, and posts to the account owner.

workflows.name: Agreement Booking Setup Generation
workflows.description: Async workflow kicking off the OOB agreement booking date/invoice date generation so recurring maintenance work orders are auto-created.

workflows.name: Truck Stock Replenishment Request
workflows.description: Cloud flow that raises a dual-write purchase order in F&O when truck-stock inventory drops below threshold.

workflows.name: Require Serial Number on Serviceable Assets
workflows.description: Business rule making msdyn_serialnumber mandatory and validating con_warrantyexpiry is in the future for active assets.

workflows.name: Certification Expiry Warning for Resources
workflows.description: Cloud flow that emails resource managers and flags bookable resources whose certification expires within 30 days so RSO can exclude them from hazardous work.

workflows.name: Project Approval Business Process Flow
workflows.description: Guides a project from New through Estimate, Contract, Delivery, and Close stages, gating quote approval and PMO health sign-off.

workflows.name: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder
workflows.description: Scans draft time entries per bookable resource and posts an Adaptive Card reminder to Teams to submit weekly time.

workflows.name: Margin Alert on Actuals Posting
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that recalculates project margin and sets con_marginalert on msdyn_project when actual cost breaches the estimated margin threshold.

workflows.name: Staffing Request Fulfillment Routing
workflows.description: Routes a new staffing request to the resourcing desk queue, creates an approval, and on approval books a bookable resource onto the project team.

workflows.name: Expense Receipt Required Rule
workflows.description: Business rule making the receipt attachment mandatory and locking submission when msdyn_amount exceeds the policy threshold until con_receiptverified is true.

workflows.name: Contract Line to F&O Sync
workflows.description: Async workflow that flags a confirmed contract line for dual-write synchronization of billing terms to Finance & Operations project accounting.

workflows.name: Sales-Ready Lead Handoff
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that reassigns a lead to the routing team and sets rating to Hot when the lead score crosses the model threshold.

workflows.name: Campaign Brief Approval Routing
workflows.description: Cloud flow that starts a multi-stage Approvals request to the marketing director and finance, then writes the outcome back to con_approvalstatus.

workflows.name: Event Registration Confirmation
workflows.description: Cloud flow triggering a real-time journey via custom trigger to send a confirmation email and add the contact to the reminder cadence.

workflows.name: Consent Change Suppression Sync
workflows.description: Async classic workflow that flags the related contact as non-marketable and removes it from active static segments.

workflows.name: Require Legal Footer Before Email Go-Live
workflows.description: Business rule that makes con_legalfooterid required and blocks Brand Approval = Approved until a legal footer is set.

workflows.name: Campaign Brief to Launch BPF
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding stages Intake > Budget Approval > Content Build > Journey Configuration > Launch across the brief, email, and journey.

workflows.name: Sync Churn Prediction to Loyalty Tier
workflows.description: Classic async workflow that reads the churn score on new Prediction Score rows and stamps con_churnriskband on the related unified profile.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: Consent Verified Guard for Segment Activation
workflows.description: Business rule that requires con_consentverified = true before an activation channel can be set, preventing non-consented audience export.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: Data Source Health Alert to Teams
workflows.description: Cloud flow that posts a Teams alert and opens a ServiceNow incident when an ingestion refresh fails.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: DSR Delete Propagation
workflows.description: Cloud flow orchestrating right-to-erasure: tombstones the unified profile, calls the CI-Data delete API, and notifies downstream systems via Azure Service Bus.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: Unified Profile Enrichment - F&O Credit
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that copies credit limit and payment terms from the F&O virtual customer master (mserp_custcustomerv3entity) onto the matched account for downstream measures.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: Data Onboarding & Unification Approval
workflows.description: Business process flow: Register Source -> Map Entities -> Assign Semantic Types -> Match Rules Review -> Unification Sign-off. Enforces CoE governance gates on new data ingestion.

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

workflows.name: AP Invoice Approval BPF
workflows.description: Business Process Flow guiding AP approvers through Review, Tier Assignment, Approval, and Post stages based on invoice amount thresholds.

workflows.name: Capex Budget Check Flow
workflows.description: Cloud flow that calls the D365 Finance budget-availability check via the F&O connector, writes con_budgetavailable, and routes to Approved or Budget Check exception.

workflows.name: Dunning Escalation Async Workflow
workflows.description: Classic async workflow that escalates dunning level and sets con_ondunninghold on the related account when overdue amount exceeds credit limit.

workflows.name: Credit Risk Rating Business Rule
workflows.description: Business rule that flags con_creditriskrating as Watchlist and makes payment terms read-only when the credit limit is exceeded by open AR.

workflows.name: Exchange Rate Sync Flow
workflows.description: Scheduled cloud flow pulling daily FX rates and stamping exchangerate + con_lastratesyncon on transactioncurrency records.

workflows.name: Vendor Invoice Post Realtime Workflow
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that writes back the approval decision to the F&O vendor invoice via dual-write and stamps the posting reference on the approval request.

workflows.name: Requisition Approval BPF
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding a requisition through Draft, Vendor Selection, Approval, and PO Generation stages.

workflows.name: Auto-Set ABC Classification
workflows.description: Business rule defaulting con_abcclassification based on product value thresholds.

workflows.name: Generate PO in F&O on Approval
workflows.description: Cloud flow that calls the F&O purchase order OData action to create a PO and writes con_generatedponumber back to the requisition.

workflows.name: Shipment Delivery Notification
workflows.description: Cloud flow notifying the customer contact and updating the related F&O sales order line ship confirmation.

workflows.name: Reassign Requisition on Vendor Approval
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that reactivates held requisitions when their suggested vendor becomes Approved.

workflows.name: Post Cycle Count Variance
workflows.description: Async workflow that flags counts with material variance for supervisor review before F&O posting.

workflows.name: Loyalty Points Accrual
workflows.description: Classic async workflow that calculates and posts reward points to the linked loyalty card when a qualifying transaction is created.

workflows.name: Curbside Handoff Notification
workflows.description: Cloud flow that alerts the store fulfillment team via Teams and sends the customer an SMS/email when they mark themselves as arrived.

workflows.name: Price Match Approval
workflows.description: Cloud flow routing competitor price-match requests through an approval to the store manager, then writing back an approved pricing rule.

workflows.name: Statement Posting Guard
workflows.description: Real-time workflow preventing a statement from moving to Posted unless all transactions are reconciled and fraud scores are cleared.

workflows.name: Gift Card Balance Rule
workflows.description: Business rule that marks a gift card inactive and hides tender eligibility when the balance reaches zero.

workflows.name: Clienteling Appointment Lifecycle
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding associates through Request > Curate Wishlist > Appointment > Follow-Up stages for personal-shopper appointments.

workflows.name: Channel Data Publish Trigger
workflows.description: Cloud flow that calls a Logic App to queue a channel data publish (job 1070) so new pricing reaches the Commerce Scale Unit.

workflows.name: Leave Request Approval
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding a leave request through Submitted -> Manager Review -> HR Validation -> Approved/Rejected stages, driving the mshr_requeststatus field at each stage.

workflows.name: Leave Balance Notification Flow
workflows.description: Cloud flow that decrements the matching mshr_leaveenrollment accrued balance and posts an approval adaptive card to the worker and manager in Teams.

workflows.name: New Hire Onboarding Orchestration
workflows.description: Generates the standard con_onboardingtask checklist from a template, provisions the M365 account, and notifies the hiring manager via Approvals.

workflows.name: Probation End Reminder
workflows.description: Classic background workflow that emails the manager and HRBP two weeks before a worker's probation end date to prompt a confirmation decision.

workflows.name: Position Cost Center Validation
workflows.description: Business rule requiring con_costcenter when con_fulltimeequivalent is greater than 0, and hiding it for FTE = 0 positions.

workflows.name: Performance Review Compensation Sync
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that flags eligible workers for a merit increase and creates a draft cdm_fixedcompensation adjustment when a review is finalized.

workflows.name: Termination Access Deprovisioning
workflows.description: On termination, disables the worker's M365 account, revokes app roles, and files an offboarding record via a Logic App bridge to ServiceNow.

workflows.name: Contoso Conversation Lifecycle BPF
workflows.description: Business process flow guiding agents through Greet, Identify Customer, Diagnose, Resolve, and Wrap-up stages of a conversation.

workflows.name: Set VIP Flag on High-Value Customer
workflows.description: Business rule that sets con_vipflag when the linked contact belongs to a strategic account segment.

workflows.name: Escalate Low-Sentiment Conversation to Supervisor
workflows.description: Real-time workflow that raises an escalation and notifies the supervisor queue when the conversation's sentiment pulse drops below threshold.

workflows.name: Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch
workflows.description: Cloud flow that sends a Customer Voice CSAT survey and writes the score back to the linked case con_csatscore.

workflows.name: Sync Channel Budget from Finance
workflows.description: Scheduled cloud flow reconciling per-channel budget vs actuals from Dynamics 365 Finance via dual-write for the CoE cost dashboard.

workflows.name: Deflection Outcome Rollup
workflows.description: Async classic workflow aggregating daily containment rate and cost avoided onto the reporting entity.

workflows.name: Environment Provisioning Approval
workflows.description: Routes new environment requests through a Teams Approval to the CoE admins; on approval updates con_lifecyclestate to Provisioning and calls the Power Platform for Admins connector to create the environment.

workflows.name: Orphaned Flow & App Detector
workflows.description: Scans workflow and app ownership; when an owner is disabled in systemuser, creates a con_coecomplianceattestation with con_result 'Orphaned - Reassign' and notifies the CoE.

workflows.name: Compliance Attestation Reminder
workflows.description: Finds attestations past con_nextduedate and sends adaptive-card reminders to attesters via Teams; escalates to business-unit owner after 14 days.

workflows.name: Account Data Steward Assignment
workflows.description: Synchronously stamps con_datastewardid from the owning business unit's default steward team when a golden-record account (con_mdmgoldenrecord = true) is created.

workflows.name: Consent Capture Business Rule
workflows.description: Makes con_consentcapturedon required and visible when con_consentstatus is set to Granted; clears it when set to Withdrawn.

workflows.name: Environment Onboarding Process
workflows.description: Guides an environment from Request > DLP Assignment > Owner Attestation > Capacity Review > Active across CoE stages.

workflows.name: Unmanaged Layer Alert
workflows.description: Async classic workflow that flags when an unmanaged solution appears in a Production environment and creates a governance task for the CoE.
